Is meloxicam same as naproxen?
Meloxicam and naproxen are both NSAIDs. They are both used to treat pain and inflammation. However, they are not the same drug. Meloxicam is a selective COX-2 inhibitor, while naproxen is a nonselective COX inhibitor. They have different chemical structures and different pharmacokinetic profiles.
